calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Continued To Jan-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Gregory P. Brock, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bode Concrete LLC.
Dan Boardman, President of Bode Concrete LLC, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Michael Heavey or Michael Heavey Construction, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on August 27, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bode Concrete LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendants Michael Heavey and Michael Heavey Construction, Inc. as follows:

As to Defendant Michael Heavey:

Damages/Principal - $89,222.10.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,403.50.
Attorney Fees - $2,220.00.
Costs - $285.00.

Total - $98,130.60.

As to Defendant Michael Heavey Construction, Inc:

Damages/Principal - $2,625.43.
Interest - $236.25.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - 285.00.

Total - $4,146.68.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than October 15, 2010.
